title: Food Package
description: Design custom food packages with ease — organize starters, main course, live kitchen, and desserts, and assign tailored menus to each category for a seamless event dining experience.

title: In-App Calendar
description: Get a clear date-wise overview of all bookings and leads. Quickly navigate through events, identify available slots, and create new leads or bookings directly from the calendar view.

title: List Of Debtors
description: Track all client financials in one place — view contact details, event dates, total costs, advance received, and outstanding balance for every account at a glance.

title: Booking List
description: Manage all bookings with priority-based status tracking and event date visibility. Edit details, update payment records, and download comprehensive booking reports in PDF.

title: Lead Trail
description: Stay on top of every lead by logging communication updates and assigning status tags during and after the lead creation process, ensuring no follow-up falls through the cracks.

title: Reports & Analytics
description: Get a complete financial snapshot — monitor total payments received, pending dues, debtors, and creditors. Apply filters by date range and category for detailed, actionable insights.
